key_items: CLARITY Act Senate markup May 14 with Bitcoin/Ethereum securities exemption provisions - major regulatory tailwind
Bitcoin ETF inflows surge while bear market drawdown remains historically shallow at 35% from ATH - institutional demand absorbing selling
Golden Cross signal on key valuation metric for first time in ~2 years + four signs of recovered bullish momentum - technical confirmation of strength
reasoning: Multiple converging bullish catalysts over the next 1-7 days: the CLARITY Act markup scheduled for May 14 represents a significant regulatory win for Bitcoin, steady ETF inflows are absorbing selling pressure, and technical indicators (Golden Cross, liquidity recovery, network activity surge) confirm bullish momentum has returned. Corporate buying (MicroStrategy, Bitmine, Circle) and institutional positioning further support price stability and upside potential.
risks: Geopolitical macro risks (US-Iran tensions, Trump-Xi collisions, new Fed Chair appointment this week) and potential CLARITY Act resistance from banking lobby/labor unions could trigger sudden negative headlines; Bhutan and other large holders continue selling, which could create unexpected supply pressure if momentum breaks.
